name: hourly: the HOURLY keyword enters a real short-stay flow instead of falling through to the overnight re-prompt (B9/F17, closes F10)
comment: F10 added HOURLY as a placeholder in the WS1 build and it has been dead ever since — sending it landed on the AWAITING_DETAILS fallback and re-prompted for overnight dates, which is what the live device test in v4 observed. Seeded from AWAITING_DETAILS rather than NEW on purpose: the greeting that advertises 'reply HOURLY' is itself what moves the guest out of NEW, so this is the state a real guest is actually in when they type it.
